---
title: "Auto-ACMG RASopathy results analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-21"
---

# Aim

Visualise results of auto-ACMG analysis before and after somatic evidence weighting
for RASopathy variants in ClinVar.

```{r, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)

safe_colorblind_palette <- c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288", "#AA4499",
                             "#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")

colours <- c(
  "Likely benign"    = "#88CCEE",
  "Benign"           = "#6699CC",
  "VUS"              = "#DDCC77",
  "Likely pathogenic"= "#CC6677",
  "Pathogenic"       = "#993333"
)

dir.create("../../Data/Figures/Final", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("../../Data/Figures",       recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r load-baseline, message=FALSE}
acmg_cols <- c("chrom", "pos", "ref", "alt", "gene", "codon_change",
                "criteria_met", "acmg_class")

path <- read_tsv("../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_path_ACMG_240426.tsv",
                 show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(acmg_cols)) %>%
  mutate(group = "Pathogenic")

ben <- read_tsv("../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_benign_ACMG_240426.tsv",
                show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(acmg_cols)) %>%
  mutate(group = "Benign")

vus_raw <- read_tsv("../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_VUS_ACMG_240426.tsv",
                    show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(acmg_cols))

# Split VUS into VUS vs Conflicting using ClinVar metadata
Clinvar_VUS_or_conflicting <- read_tsv(
  "../../Data/Clinvar_060225/Clinvar_build_38_DDG2P_germline_VUS_conflicting_missense.tsv.gz",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(var_ID = paste0("chr", Chromosome, "_", PositionVCF, "_",
                         ReferenceAlleleVCF, "_", AlternateAlleleVCF)) %>%
  dplyr::select(var_ID, ClinicalSignificance, PhenotypeList)

vus <- vus_raw %>%
  mutate(var_ID = paste(chrom, pos, ref, alt, sep = "_")) %>%
  left_join(Clinvar_VUS_or_conflicting, by = "var_ID") %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(
    ClinicalSignificance == "Uncertain significance"                       ~ "VUS",
    ClinicalSignificance == "Conflicting classifications of pathogenicity" ~ "Conflicting",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(group)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-var_ID, -ClinicalSignificance, -PhenotypeList)

all_dat <- bind_rows(path, ben, vus) %>%
  mutate(acmg_class = factor(acmg_class,
                              levels = c("Benign", "Likely benign", "VUS",
                                         "Likely pathogenic", "Pathogenic")))
```

```{r load-somatic, message=FALSE}
vus_raw_somatic <- read_tsv(
  "../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_VUS_ACMG_somatic_240426.tsv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(acmg_cols))

vus_somatic <- vus_raw_somatic %>%
  mutate(var_ID = paste(chrom, pos, ref, alt, sep = "_")) %>%
  left_join(Clinvar_VUS_or_conflicting, by = "var_ID") %>%
  mutate(group = case_when(
    ClinicalSignificance == "Uncertain significance"                       ~ "VUS",
    ClinicalSignificance == "Conflicting classifications of pathogenicity" ~ "Conflicting",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )) %>%
  filter(!is.na(group)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-var_ID, -ClinicalSignificance, -PhenotypeList) %>%
  mutate(acmg_class = factor(acmg_class,
                              levels = c("Benign", "Likely benign", "VUS",
                                         "Likely pathogenic", "Pathogenic")))
```

```{r counts}
path %>% count(acmg_class)
ben  %>% count(acmg_class)
vus  %>% count(acmg_class)
```

# Auto-ACMG before somatic weighting

```{r plot-before, fig.width=8, fig.height=2.5}
ggplot(all_dat,
       aes(x = factor(group, levels = c("Benign", "VUS", "Conflicting", "Pathogenic")),
           fill = acmg_class)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colours) +
  labs(x = "ClinVar classification", fill = "Auto-ACMG outcome", y = "Proportion") +
  coord_flip()
```

```{r plot-before-vus, fig.width=8, fig.height=2}
plot_vus_only <- ggplot(
  all_dat %>% filter(group %in% c("VUS", "Conflicting")),
  aes(x = factor(group, levels = c("VUS", "Conflicting")), fill = acmg_class)
) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colours) +
  labs(x = "ClinVar class", fill = "Auto-ACMG outcome", y = "Proportion") +
  coord_flip()

plot_vus_only

```

# Auto-ACMG after somatic weighting

```{r plot-after, fig.width=8, fig.height=2}
plot2 <- ggplot(vus_somatic,
                aes(x = factor(group, levels = c("VUS", "Conflicting")),
                    fill = acmg_class)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colours) +
  labs(x = "ClinVar class", fill = "Auto-ACMG outcome", y = "Proportion") +
  coord_flip()

plot2

```

# VUS before vs after somatic weighting

```{r plot-combined-vus, fig.width=7, fig.height=3}
combined_plotdat <- bind_rows(
  all_dat %>%
    filter(group %in% c("VUS", "Conflicting")) %>%
    mutate(dataset = "Auto ACMG outcome before somatic weighting"),
  vus_somatic %>%
    mutate(dataset = "Auto ACMG outcome after somatic weighting")
) %>%
  mutate(dataset = factor(dataset,
                          levels = c("Auto ACMG outcome before somatic weighting",
                                     "Auto ACMG outcome after somatic weighting")))

thresh <- 0.04

label_dat <- combined_plotdat %>%
  filter(group %in% c("VUS", "Conflicting")) %>%
  count(dataset, group, acmg_class) %>%
  group_by(dataset, group) %>%
  mutate(prop  = n / sum(n),
         label = ifelse(prop >= thresh, as.character(n), ""))

ggplot(combined_plotdat %>% filter(group %in% c("VUS", "Conflicting")),
       aes(x = factor(group, levels = c("VUS", "Conflicting")), fill = acmg_class)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  geom_text(
    data = label_dat,
    aes(y = prop, label = label),
    position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colours) +
  labs(x = "ClinVar class", fill = "", y = "Proportion") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ dataset, ncol = 1)
```

# All pathogenicity categories before and after somatic weighting

```{r load-all-classes, message=FALSE}
path_somatic <- read_tsv(
  "../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_path_ACMG_somatic_240426.tsv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(acmg_cols)) %>%
  mutate(group = "(likely) pathogenic")

ben_somatic <- read_tsv(
  "../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/Clinvar_benign_ACMG_somatic_240426.tsv",
  show_col_types = FALSE
) %>%
  dplyr::select(all_of(acmg_cols)) %>%
  mutate(group = "(likely) benign")

all_dat_baseline <- bind_rows(
  path %>% mutate(group = "(likely) pathogenic"),
  ben  %>% mutate(group = "(likely) benign"),
  vus
) %>%
  mutate(acmg_class = factor(acmg_class,
                              levels = c("Benign", "Likely benign", "VUS",
                                         "Likely pathogenic", "Pathogenic")))

all_dat_somatic <- bind_rows(
  path_somatic,
  ben_somatic,
  vus_somatic
) %>%
  mutate(acmg_class = factor(acmg_class,
                              levels = c("Benign", "Likely benign", "VUS",
                                         "Likely pathogenic", "Pathogenic")))
```

```{r plot-all-classes, fig.width=7, fig.height=3}
combined_all <- bind_rows(
  all_dat_baseline %>% mutate(dataset = "Auto ACMG outcome before somatic weighting"),
  all_dat_somatic  %>% mutate(dataset = "Auto ACMG outcome after somatic weighting")
) %>%
  mutate(dataset = factor(dataset,
                          levels = c("Auto ACMG outcome before somatic weighting",
                                     "Auto ACMG outcome after somatic weighting")))

# Export for Figures_for_somatic_germline_paper.Rmd
write_csv(combined_all, "../../Data/auto_ACMG_output/ACMG_all_classes_before_after_somatic.csv")

label_dat_all <- combined_all %>%
  count(dataset, group, acmg_class) %>%
  group_by(dataset, group) %>%
  mutate(prop  = n / sum(n),
         label = ifelse(prop >= 0.04, as.character(n), ""))

ggplot(combined_all,
       aes(x = factor(group, levels = c("(likely) benign", "VUS", "Conflicting",
                                         "(likely) pathogenic")),
           fill = acmg_class)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  geom_text(
    data = label_dat_all,
    aes(y = prop, label = label),
    position = position_fill(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 3
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colours) +
  labs(x = "ClinVar class", fill = "", y = "Proportion") +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ dataset, ncol = 1)
```

# Percentage of VUS reclassified by somatic weighting

```{r vus-resolved}
reclass_table <- vus %>%
  dplyr::select(chrom, pos, ref, alt, acmg_class) %>%
  dplyr::rename(acmg_class_before = acmg_class) %>%
  left_join(vus_somatic %>% dplyr::select(chrom, pos, ref, alt, acmg_class),
            by = c("chrom", "pos", "ref", "alt"))

# The somatic and non-somatic ACMG runs take the same input variant file, so
# every variant must appear in both outputs. Fail loudly if any after-class is
# missing (an unmatched join would otherwise silently bias pct_resolved down,
# since NA != "VUS" drops those rows from the numerator but not the denominator).
stopifnot(sum(is.na(reclass_table$acmg_class)) == 0)

denominator <- reclass_table %>% filter(acmg_class_before == "VUS") %>% nrow()

reclass_tab <- reclass_table %>%
  filter(acmg_class_before == "VUS") %>%
  count(acmg_class)

reclass_tab

pct_resolved <- reclass_tab %>%
  filter(acmg_class != "VUS") %>%
  summarise(pct = sum(n) / denominator * 100) %>%
  pull(pct)

cat("Percentage of auto-ACMG VUS reclassified by somatic weighting:", round(pct_resolved, 1), "%\n")
```
